# Jira Story Template

```
### Summary

<What and why. Keep it concise.>

### Scope

<Bullet list of what needs to be done.>

### Acceptance Criteria

<Conditions that must be true for the story to be considered done.>

### Design Considerations (optional)

<Trade-offs, options, open questions to resolve during implementation.>

### Out of Scope (optional)

<What this story explicitly does not cover.>

### References (optional)

<Links to code, docs, Slack threads, related stories.>
```
